subject: ASAP: Software Engineer – Java
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the healthcare sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a senior Software Engineer with strong experience in Java. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:

  • Java
  • Kafka

Details:
Client: NordHealth
Start: ASAP
Duration: 12 months
Location: Göteborg (hybrid)
Rate: up to 950 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
David Karlsson
Head of Staffing
Agile Minds
Tel: +46 70 890 12 34
